description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton with a predominantly red and white color scheme, featuring the brand name 'EASY MOUZUO' prominently at the top. The front and back panels display vivid images of whole and sliced apples, palm trees, and a tropical background, clearly indicating the apple flavor. The packaging includes both English and French text, with 'apple drink' and 'boisson de pomme' written on opposite sides. The side panels contain detailed product information, including ingredients, nutritional facts, and a barcode. The top of the carton is sealed, with a small triangular fold typical of single-serve juice boxes. The overall appearance is clean, glossy, and designed to attract attention in a retail or urban vending context.
description: A red and white rectangular apple juice carton with vivid apple and palm tree graphics, brand name 'EASY MOUZUO', and detailed product information on the sides.
description_view_0: The front view shows the 'EASY MOUZUO' brand, apple drink label, apple and palm tree graphics, and a 200ml volume indication.
description_view_1: This side view displays multilingual product information, ingredients, and a barcode, with less visual emphasis on branding or graphics.
description_view_2: The back view features the French label 'boisson de pomme', similar apple and palm tree graphics, and the same 200ml volume marking.
description_view_3: This side view presents the nutritional facts panel and additional product details, with minimal branding or imagery.
attribute_juice_flavor_illustration: whole and sliced apples with palm trees
